name: Stamp and Go (Codfish Cakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the codfish in a bowl and cover with warm water. Soak for 2 hours or longer, according to saltiness and hardness of the fish.
2. Drain, rinse, and place fish in a saucepan with boiling water covering it.
3. Simmer gently, covered, until fish is tender (about 15 minutes).
4. Drain, remove skin and bones. Shred the fish finely.
5. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together.
6. Combine eggs, milk, butter, and annatto oil in a separate bowl. Stir in the dry mixture.
7. Add shredded fish, chopped onions, and hot pepper to the batter. Mix well.
8. Drop spoonfuls of batter into hot oil (370F) and fry until golden brown.
9. Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
